name: Safari
description: Web browser developed by Apple, built on the WebKit engine and bundled with macOS, iOS, iPadOS, visionOS, and watchOS.

years.notes: Flat redesign that replaced the skeuomorphic 2003 compass — shipped progressively across iOS 7 (2013) and macOS Yosemite (2014). Two-tone blue radial gradient face with a silver bezel, red-and-grey compass needle pointing northeast, and silver tick marks. Used through macOS Catalina (2019).

Big Sur era refresh shipped with macOS Big Sur and iOS 14 (2020). Brighter cyan-to-blue radial gradient face, thinner silver bezel, and refined red-and-grey compass needle. Current Safari mark in 2026.

notes: Skipped millésimes: 2003 Mac OS X Panther original skeuomorphic compass (only available as raster PNG icons embedded in the macOS app bundle — no authoritative SVG source; the project's raster-to-SVG tracer is not available yet, and PNG references found online are below the 256×256 quality bar for tracing). 2010 Safari 5 minor refresh (no separately vectorised asset — the 2003-era skeuomorphic compass continued in use).
